amountDue.description: The amount due for the charge.

amountPaid.description: The amount paid for the charge.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time the record was created. (Timezone: UTC)

glAccountID.description: Id of the general ledger account associated with this charge.

lastModifiedBy.description: User who last modified the record.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the record was last modified. (Timezone: UTC)

leaseID.description: Id of the lease associated with this charge.

parentTxID.description: Parent Charge ID. If parent charge date and recharge date are same consider it as a hidden recharge and do not include it in ledger balance calculation.

portfolioID.description: Id of the portfolio associated with this charge.
